description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and a flat top surface. The front features two vertically aligned doors, each with a brass knob handle; the upper half of the doors has transparent or open panels, while the lower half is covered with a woven or textured material. The cabinet stands on four straight legs and has a smooth, natural wood grain finish throughout. The sides and back are solid wood panels, with no visible openings or decorative elements. The interior appears to have at least one shelf, dividing the storage space into two compartments. This piece is suitable for storing household items, books, or decorative objects and would fit well in an urban home, office, or public space.
description: A medium-sized wooden cabinet with two front doors, brass knobs, and a mix of transparent and woven lower panels. It features a natural wood grain finish and stands on four legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors with brass knobs, upper transparent/open panels, and lower woven/textured panels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wood panel with no openings or decorative features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wood panel covering the entire back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood panel.
